content:
🚀 openhuman | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a private, locally-run AI assistant that can manage tasks and information without relying on external cloud services for core functions.
✨ Key Features: • Private and local AI • Simple and powerful interface • Managed services integration • Local memory management
📖 Summary: OpenHuman is a personal AI superintelligence designed for private, local use. It aims to be simple yet powerful, acting as an AI harness that prioritizes user control and local memory.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
